How to use this service.description: Guide to configuring your Slack bot for multi-enrollment relay

user_parameters_schema.description: Configure which customer secret holds your Slack bot token

bot_token_secret.description: Name of your customer secret containing the Slack bot token (xoxb-...)
bot_token_secret.title: Bot Token Secret Name

default_channel.description: Default Slack channel ID to post to (e.g. C0123ABC). Can be overridden per request via the target field.
default_channel.title: Default Channel ID

user_parameters_schema.title: Slack Relay Configuration

bot_token_secret.ui:description: Enter the name of the secret that stores your Slack bot token

default_channel.ui:description: Default channel ID (leave empty to require target in each request)
